channel.title: Case Studies and Projects
channel.description: Description: A look at how we think, design, and build for real-world clients.

item.title: AI voice agents for streamlined medical practices - Transform9
item.description: Transform9 is a healthcare AI platform helping clinics automate patient communication, from booking to routine requests. We designed their brand identity and website, building a digital presence that makes AI-driven technology feel approachable and trustworthy.

item.title: Train your teams - Arist
item.description: This web design project was done for Arist, the platform that helps businesses effectively train their team right in their working environment, training faster and lifting performance — all by delivering learning fully in the messaging tools used every day.

item.title: A fictional space-food website exploring 3D scroll interactions - Planetoño
item.description: An experimental interface concept exploring how 3D environments, scroll mechanics, and animated UI components can transform a simple ordering flow into an interactive narrative experience.

item.title: Icons for EMUI 10 - Huawei
item.description: In summer 2019, we’ve got an offer from HUAWEI to collaborate on design of basic icon set for the EMUI custom Android user interface. Our task was to redesign 54 icons using clean and simple design language that would meet the general trends and patterns, however, would still be different from the competitors. The main goal was not to come up with something completely different, but to make more of an aesthetic update that would be loved by current Huawei fans and would attract new users.

item.title: Ukrainian audiobooks platform - Abuk
item.description: Abuk is Ukraine’s leading platform for audiobooks, ebooks, and podcasts, offering a carefully curated library of titles, including exclusive releases recorded in professional studios to meet the highest international standards. These exclusives are voiced by talented actors, radio, and TV narrators, creating a listening experience that is both immersive and authentic.

item.title: Comprehensive analysis of connection performance - Netti
item.description: Netti is a mobile app for measuring internet speed and key connection metrics in real time. It provides insights into download and upload performance, ping, latency, signal strength, and data routes.

item.title: Product design for an innovative AgTech company - FarmSense
item.description: FarmSense is a USA-based innovative tech product that helps growers reduce losses from insect pests and lower dependence on pesticides to take the uncertainty out of pest management for better farming and a brighter future.

item.title: Interview podcast website - Non Conventional Show
item.description: Nonconventional is the show hosted by Ela Crain, inviting to dive into the unique set of interviews with amazing guests from all walks of life asked the questions that usually go unasked. It builds a bridge between the conventional and the nonconventional, ordinary and extraordinary, inspiring viewers and listeners to embrace their nonconventional side. The task for the tubik team was to create a website that would uncover the mission and content of the project in a bright and uncommon manner, to inform and engage, impress and inspire.

item.title: AI-powered data insights for hospitality and FMCG - Knead That Dough
item.description: ​Knead That Dough is a data consultancy that helps hospitality and FMCG businesses transform complex data into clear, actionable insights through AI-driven analytics and custom reporting.

item.title: Digital art and animations for mobile - HUAWEI P50
item.description: One of the leading providers of communication technologies and smart devices, HUAWEI, introduced to the market the foldable smartphone P50 Pocket, with immersive big-screen views and innovative features in folded mode. Striving to add top-level aesthetic appeal to each and every detail, they wanted to provide users with a set of original animations for the always-on-display mode with a clock shown on the small screen on top of the folded phone as a part of the user experience. And that was the task they requested our team to accomplish.

item.title: Interactive storytelling about a social issue - Decriminalize Poverty
item.description: Decriminalize Poverty in Tennessee is the web project that emerged from a report by the Vera Institute of Justice and Free Hearts. This narrative experience explores how poverty has been criminalized across Tennessee, what this means for people who live in communities in the state, and practical steps to build a better future.

item.title: A blueprint‑style 3D scroll for industrial tech - Alphane Labs
item.description: A one‑page concept site and scroll‑driven 3D experience for Alphane Labs and their industrial air sensor. Built around orthographic projection, custom shaders, and motion‑led storytelling that reveals the device layer by layer.

item.title: Scroll-based UI for a modular 3D toy concept - Der Baukasten
item.description: A concept site and 3D scroll experience built for Der Baukasten—a modular toy project rooted in Ukrainian myth, blending character design, storytelling, and 3D printing into one interactive digital showcase.

item.title: Creative production company - Hyperion
item.description: Hyperion is a full-service production team that values editorial creativity and is dedicated to working with the latest talent in the industry to deliver top-notch results in branded content, commercials, print ads, ecommerce, and augmented reality.

item.title: Data center product management company - EternaCloud
item.description: EternaCloud is a partner who helps data center owner, provider and supplier teams execute global design standards for critical equipment.

item.title: Healthcare education and innovation company - Orakle
item.description: Orakle is a healthcare education and innovation company helping medical professionals improve the way they practice medicine. Combining technology, research, and case-based learning, they deliver digital and in-person programs that enhance clinical skills and patient outcomes.

item.title: Empowering communities through education - Pencils of Promise
item.description: Pencils of Promise is a US non-profit organization that creates schools, programs, and global communities around the goal of education for all, having built 605 schools across Laos, Guatemala, and Ghana. For their initiative, we created a children’s book with custom illustrations and later adapted it into a website with animated visuals and interactive educational content.

item.title: Heat pump installation company - Manatee Energy
item.description: Manatee Energy is a consumer-facing platform focused on making it easy, transparent, and affordable to install heat pumps by leveraging software and automation to lower overhead costs.

item.title: Dentistry community - Fireside
item.description: Fireside is the first membership community for pediatric dentists with access to exclusive resources, expert support, and vendor discounts to grow practice with ease.

item.title: Interactive history section for an advocacy project on jailhouse lawyers - Flashlights
item.description: A timeline-based website section about the history and impact of jailhouse lawyers, created with the Jailhouse Lawyers Initiative at NYU School of Law.

item.title: Protein-rich caffeinated chocolate milk - SPYLT
item.description: Catchy and captivating ecommerce website designed and implemented for SPYLT, a bright and energetic brand of protein-rich caffeinated chocolate milk with bold and delicious flavors.

item.title: Доставка та логістика для бізнесу - ShipDaddy
item.description: ShipDaddy — клієнтоорієнтована складська та фулфілмент-компанія, яка допомагає бізнесу оптимізувати всю свою стратегію електронної комерції, включаючи доставку та логістику. Команда Tubik створила фірмовий стиль і веб-сайт, які допоможуть переосмислити сторонню логістичну компанію і дати світові зрозуміти, що співробітники ShipDaddy щиро піклуються про успіх своїх клієнтів.

item.title: Open protocol for decentralized exchange - 0x
item.description: 0x is an open-source protocol enabling peer-to-peer exchange of digital assets on the Ethereum blockchain. It serves developers, platforms, and the broader DeFi ecosystem by providing reliable infrastructure for building decentralized trading products.

item.title: Ukrainian audiobooks library - Abuk (archived)
item.description: ABUK is a big library of audiobooks in the Ukrainian language. In fact, it’s the audiobook store, based on the original high-quality sound recording. It offers classic and contemporary Ukrainian and world literature to be listened to on smartphones and tablets.

item.title: The power of education - Evergreen Nexus University
item.description: In this project, we designed and implemented a university website, neat, functional, friendly, and informative. Elegant, smooth user experience and wise content arrangement have been thought out to impress users and amplify the power of education.

item.title: Devastating impact of inaccurate field drug tests - Drug Test Innocence
item.description: Drug Test Innocence is an online resource that uncovers the devastating impact of inaccurate field drug tests, which are the largest source of wrongful arrests and convictions in the United States these days. The website provides a detailed presentation of the issue based on research and real cases and offers considerations and solutions on how to limit that impact. It is one more award-winning project we made in collaboration with Zealous, an organization challenging injustice through media, storytelling, and arts. The team behind the initiative is The Roadside Drug Test Innocence Alliance, which is dedicated to reducing the harm done by inaccurate field test kits.

item.title: Guide for public defenders and social justice advocates - Advocacy Through Walls
item.description: Advocacy Through Walls is an interactive guide for public defenders, community-based organizations, and other social justice advocates on how to ethically and intentionally engage with people currently incarcerated or directly impacted by systemic advocacy. The guide is built on research and interviews on trauma-informed care and inside programs focused on self-empowerment. It is another initiative by Zealous, the organization challenging injustice through media, storytelling, and arts.

item.title: Adult toys e-commerce store - Toy Joy
item.description: Daring and seductively sexy e-commerce website selling toys for adults: neat balance of elegance, engagement, informativeness, and emotional appeal, letting find the way to joy.

item.title: Bionic prostheses with therapy and training - HP23
item.description: Website design and development for the company producing bionic prostheses with therapy and training for their users, pushing innovations and evolution of the prosthetics sphere.

item.title: High-quality synthetic data creation and management platform - Synthesized 2.0
item.description: Synthesized helps QA and ML teams create, validate and safely share high-quality data for data analysis, model training, and software testing without extensive manual configurations.

item.title: A provider of the best hotel deals in Switzerland - HotelCard
item.description: Membership subscription for smart hotel experiences’ discounts with more than 500 hotels in & around Switzerland

item.title: Personal and business finances management tools - iBilly
item.description: iBilly is a company that presents several solutions for the administration of personal and business finances. These solutions include mobile apps, desktop dashboards and POS terminal

item.title: B2B healthcare payments company - Nibble Health
item.description: A B2B healthcare payments company working to make care more affordable and accessible for millions of Americans

item.title: Delivery app to order snacks, beer and associated stuff - Glup
item.description: Heineken Mexico has launched a mobile application for buying beer and associated goods and getting the orders delivered quickly. The design project consisted of establishing the product visual identity design and running full UI/UX design of the app.

item.title: 3D editing software - uMake
item.description: uMake is a digital service that opens the way to make beautiful designs with a library of content and easy-to-use tools. It lets CAD professionals and 3D modeling enthusiasts create immersive 3D content on the go, giving them complete freedom to transform their imagination into a reality. The task for tubik team was to develop an attractive and efficient identity that would help uMake brand set solid connections with users and could be flexible for diverse marketing needs. Also, we worked on a bright and informative website highlighting the benefits of the tools, engaging to try them, and communicating with visitors in a friendly and confident manner.

item.title: Marketing services marketplace - Mayple
item.description: Mayple is the creator of a fully-managed marketing services marketplace designed to help businesses work with the experts who are best suited to their needs and goals. The task was to create a new website design, simple and intuitive to use, which will tell the target audience about the advantages of the product and help expand sales. The work done includes the UX / UI stages with implementation on the Webflow platform.

item.title: Award-winning website about Stanley Kubrick's life and work - Kubrick
item.description: This website is dedicated to Stanley Kubrick's 90th birthday, his life and work. It is a digital editorial exploring the creative legacy of legendary film director. Stanley Kubrick was an American film director, screenwriter, and producer. He is frequently cited as one of the greatest and most influential directors in cinematic history.

item.title: Employee wellbeing platform - Juno
item.description: Juno is the all-in-one employee wellbeing platform, joined by businesses to create healthier and happier cultures through flexible, inclusive, and socially conscious workplace benefits designed for remote teams

item.title: Interactive media about radiation - Illuminating Radioactivity
item.description: Illuminated Radioactivity project blends policy, scientific, and creative expertise to produce interactive media that demystify radiation and offer practical information about radiation protection. The project aimed at covering the radioactivity issue from a non-negative perspective and amplifying the information with the out-of-the-box visual presentation so that it appealed to the audience of different ages. Presented with the vibes of brutalism, trendy custom graphics, an attractive mixture of photo and illustration art, engaging scroll experience, and super interactive pages, it illuminates the issue with the elegance of well-crafted design.

item.title: Fintech product with credit experience for Indian market - Uni
item.description: Uni is an innovative fintech service building enhanced credit experience. Tubik team worked on elegant and informative landing page to support the brand's effective web presence.

item.title: Health app that reacts on your behaviour - Uplyfe
item.description: Uplyfe is an AI-powered health app that reacts on your behaviour in nutrition & exercise and provides personal recommendations. The app is designed to help users improve their health, as well as prevent or manage noncommunicable diseases (NCDs). Our goal was to create bright brand identity for this new health app, welcome to check it out!

item.title: Carbon offsets and renewable energy - Superly
item.description: Superly is the marketplace that cares about solutions dealing with the climate crisis and combines crypto technologies and digital innovations with offsetting carbon footprint for that objective.

item.title: Museum of mountain photography - Lumen
item.description: Man’s fascination with mountains has been unbroken as long as anyone can remember. LUMEN, an awesome museum of mountain photography, gives this fascination a photographic home with breathtaking views and interesting insights. New LUMEN Museum website design aims at transferring that refreshing experience to the web right from the mountains. It lets diverse visitors feel the harmony of nature, composition, and original content. Check the airy interface, original layout, trendy and elegant typography, and smooth motion.

item.title: Vacation rentals marketplace - Hometogo
item.description: HomeToGo is a marketplace with the world’s largest selection of vacation rentals, whose vision is to make incredible accommodation easily accessible to everyone. HomeToGo connects property suppliers — from OTAs, property managers and homeowners — with guests from around the world. From vacation homes, cabins, beach houses, apartments, condos, house boats, castles, farm stays and everything in between, HomeToGo combines price, destination, dates and amenities to find the perfect accommodation for any trip worldwide. Founded in 2014 as a metasearch engine, HomeTogo has since evolved drastically beyond its original brand to both an all-encompassing marketplace and operating system connecting demand and supply. To highlight this evolution, HomeToGo was eager to rebrand by summer 2021 and tapped Tubik Studio to support with this effort. HomeToGo’s internal design team approached us with a formed and strong concept already in mind. We joined forces in order to create an entirely new design and brand story for HomeToGo, launching this in summer 2021 ahead of the company’s public listing on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange.

item.title: Ride-hailing service - Vertt
item.description: Vertt is a ride-hailing service connecting drivers and passengers in Switzerland. As the synonym of Swiss top values (Security, Reliability, Responsibility and Simplicity) Vertt performs the outstanding mobility solution nowadays.

item.title: Design awards voting website - Annual Awwwards 2020
item.description: Awwwards is globally known and recognized as a place uniting designers and developers to share and reward creativity and innovative approaches. Every year, they pick up the best websites, designers, studios, agencies, developers, e-commerce and mobile projects to award. For that goal, a special website for voting, Awwwards of the Year, is created, each year by a different team that is also an Awwwards resident. In 2020, Awwwards made it together with Tubik.

item.title: An event agency with a high-quality selection of visual artists - Point Zero 25
item.description: PointZero25 is the agency that helps organize perfect events with high-quality artists and thorough service. It combines international producing expertise to offer end-to-end theatrical strategy and execution support for musicals, plays, and cabaret shows.

item.title: Sleep inducing stories and meditation app - Slumber
item.description: Slumber is a collection of ultra-relaxing sleep inducing stories and meditations designed to beat insomnia and help you fall asleep quickly every single night.

item.title: Minecraft models and assets marketplace - BlockStock
item.description: BlockStock is a marketplace for high-quality, low-cost Minecraft models and assets, supporting beginner developers who plan their education, architecture, or entertainment projects in the Minecraft world.

item.title: HR management in healthcare - Credentially
item.description: Credentially is a groundbreaking SAAS product designed to take the HR management in healthcare to a whole new level by automating hiring, onboarding and tracking the compliance of the employees. Can you imagine how much paperwork is needed to make one’s way through all these processes? Obviously, old-school approaches don’t seem to stay effective in the modern fast-pace world. Credentially totally nails it and paves the simple and efficient way to hiring success with technologies of the new digital world.

item.title: To-do list app - Upper
item.description: Upper is a stylish to-do list app that seeks to reduce screen distractions with a simple interface and limited features

item.title: A curated food marketplace - Kaiten
item.description: A curated food marketplace that fuels the future of dining by helping makers reach wider audiences and giving them a supportive community

item.title: Identity and ecommerce website for a tea brand - Bennett
item.description: Bennett is a modern brand offering users high-quality tea for different tastes. It produces various types of worldwide popular beverage, such as black tea, herbal tea, green tea, decaffeinated tea, iced tea, and seasonal tea. The brand is positioned on the crossroads of hot trends and classic traditions and transfers the idea of elite, exclusive products which are about the lifestyle and mood rather than just a drink.

item.title: High-quality synthetic data creation and management platform - Synthesized
item.description: Synthesized delivers the first API-driven data generation platform that QA and ML teams can easily use to access high-quality data in minutes

item.title: Visual identity and website for a pre-tax benefits administration company - Malloy Banks
item.description: Malloy Banks is a benefits administration company that streamlines pre-tax benefit programs through intuitive digital tools and personalized support.

item.title: Fintech service for effective employee payments - Immediate
item.description: Immediate is the fintech service that helps businesses effectively provide their employees with the benefits of pay access meeting actual employees' needs instead of sticking to traditional payroll.

item.title: Brewery and restaurant in Dnipro - MOVA
item.description: MOVA is a brewery based in Dnipro, Ukraine, that fosters connections between people through its unique culture and vibe.

item.title: Experimental niche food producer - B-EGG
item.description: B-Egg is an egg farm producing niche egg products for convenient and healthy cooking. The tubik team designed and developed a functional and catchy e-commerce website as well as original packaging, allowing the brand to enhance its communication with customers and sell its product successfully.

item.title: Marketing campaign for the postal company - Nova Post Advent Calendar
item.description: Nova Post is a big Ukrainian postal and courier company that provides logistics and related services involving innovative approaches and technologies. In this project, the tubik team worked on a bright and festive advent calendar of discounts and special offers for the marketing campaign of the winter holiday season.

item.title: Management platform for golf professionals - ProAgenda
item.description: ProAgenda is a platform that helps golf professionals build an online client database, maximize booking retainment, save time and effort on administrative work, and manage automated services and reporting.

item.title: Food recipes app - Perfect Recipes App
item.description: A food app for users who love cooking. It includes the recipe database which is constantly updated. Also, the application has a supplies manager. To make UX more extended, it allowed users to find the recipes by the supplies they currently had at home or create a shopping list to buy ingredients that were missing.

item.title: A wellness tool for better breathing - Komuso Design
item.description: Komuso is a team working on natural and effective ways of relaxation and wellness improvement, and that’s what their product Shift is about. The Shift was created by Todd and Vanessa Steinberg, the husband-and-wife team and co-founders of Komuso Design. They were both very stressed out and feeling disconnected, so they invented a way to make a difference. The Shift is the world’s first wellness tool that makes you breathe better to help you feel better. The task for the tubik team in this project was to create a neat and stylish website design and landing pages that would effectively present the essence and benefits of the product, have solid emotional appeal, and transfer the mood of relaxation and balance. We also worked on custom graphics, 3D animation, and consistent social media posting templates for efficient brand communication strengthening its online presence.

item.title: iOS application tracking plants watering - Watering Tracker
item.description: Watering Tracker is a mobile application that helps users take care of their plants by keeping up with the watering schedule

item.title: Online scientific journal - Physica Magazine
item.description: Physica is an online scientific journal with articles in Physics, Maths, AI & Computer Science, Earth Science, and the like written by practising scientists and packed with the best journalistic art and storytelling traditions.

item.title: Courier delivery service - Carricare
item.description: Carricare is a service that effectively connects couriers and customers expecting the order to set perfect conditions and timing for delivery. It is an instant and real-time notification platform for delivery couriers that helps clients with last-minute delivery notifications, allowing them to manage their time better. The task for the Tubik team was to build a strong identity that reflects brand values as well as helps it get recognized easily and communicate with customers in a friendly manner.

item.title: Custom burger ordering service - Tasty Burger
item.description: Its extended functionality allows users to order a traditional burger from the menu or customize any option for themselves adding or removing the ingredients. Here you can check the screens showing user journey. They feature all the flow of choice and customization of a burger as well as the screens for delivery or picking up an order.

item.title: Modern line of personalized wedding dresses - MYWONY
item.description: MYWONY is a modern line of personalized wedding dresses with special attention to high quality, elegant details, perfect fit, and feminine silhouettes. The history of the brand dates back to 2012, from a small wedding workshop Ca’Rousel, created by a tandem of two designers. Today, the wedding collections of the MYWONY brand are popular with brides from different countries around the world.

item.title: Culturally aware financial app targeted at the Caribbean region - Serra
item.description: iOS/Android app with a mission to build a culturally aware financial application from the ground up in Montserrat (Caribbean region) by solving locals’ real-life challenges.

item.title: Accessible payment processing service for SMEs - Crezco
item.description: Crezco is a fintech product that employs technology to eliminate unnecessary expenses and frictions in trading for businesses, bringing suppliers and buyers together and supporting their growth. That is a creative and modern solution, especially for small businesses that focus on what matters most, while payment processes are all covered with Crezco. The service strived to set up a solid and trustworthy brand image and communication that would clearly transfer the idea of reliable and straightforward financial operations and business support.
